home.heroSub: We build the software that runs fleet, logistics, and industrial operations in the real world.
home.footerCtaSub: We take a small number of clients. If your problem is hard and the stakes are real, let's talk.

solutions.pageSub: The software layer for real-world operations.
solutions.card1Desc: Real-time operations software for electric and mixed fleets
solutions.card2Desc: Edge devices and sensor networks for industrial environments
solutions.card3Desc: Route, schedule, and load optimization for ground operations

fleet-mobility.title: Fleet & EV Mobility
fleet-mobility.desc: Real-time operations software for electric and mixed fleets
fleet-mobility.problemStatement: Fleet managers running mixed EV and ICE vehicles struggle to unify dispatch, charging, and route planning in one view. Data lives across multiple systems — GPS, charging APIs, and depot schedules that don't talk to each other. Decisions get made on yesterday's information while the fleet is moving today.
fleet-mobility.whoThisIsFor: Transport operators and fleet managers running 10 or more vehicles who need a single screen for dispatch, charging schedules, and real-time vehicle state.
fleet-mobility.capability1Body: One dashboard shows every vehicle's location, charge level, and dispatch assignment — updated live. No manual data pulls required.
fleet-mobility.capability2Body: Routes assignments against live traffic, vehicle range, and depot availability so drivers receive the right job at the right time.
fleet-mobility.capability3Body: Schedules charging windows against shift patterns and grid tariffs to reduce idle cost without stranding vehicles before the next run.

iot-hardware.title: IoT & Hardware
iot-hardware.desc: Edge devices and sensor networks for industrial environments
iot-hardware.problemStatement: Industrial environments run on sensors and edge devices that most software ignores. Data sits on local machines or arrives too noisy to act on. The gap between field hardware and business decisions costs time and money every shift.
iot-hardware.whoThisIsFor: Operations engineers and plant managers who need reliable, structured data from the field without building custom integrations from scratch for every device.
iot-hardware.capability1Body: Connects to existing PLCs, sensors, and telemetry hardware without requiring equipment replacement or extensive reconfiguration.
iot-hardware.capability2Body: Filters noise, normalizes data streams, and surfaces actionable events so operators see what matters and not what doesn't.
iot-hardware.capability3Body: Sends structured, timestamped data upstream to dashboards and decision systems — ready to act on without additional cleaning.

logistics-intelligence.title: Logistics Intelligence
logistics-intelligence.desc: Route, schedule, and load optimization for ground operations
logistics-intelligence.problemStatement: Ground operations lose efficiency to static schedules that don't respond to live conditions — traffic delays, load changes, and vehicle availability shift constantly throughout the day. Each manual replan takes time the operation doesn't have and knowledge the dispatcher shouldn't need to hold in their head.
logistics-intelligence.whoThisIsFor: Logistics managers and operations planners running multi-stop ground routes with variable loads, tight delivery windows, and fleets that change throughout the day.
logistics-intelligence.capability1Body: Adjusts routes continuously against live traffic, capacity constraints, and priority signals so drivers are always on the most efficient path.
logistics-intelligence.capability2Body: Matches cargo weight and volume against vehicle capacity to reduce trip count and avoid over- or under-loaded runs.
logistics-intelligence.capability3Body: Flags deviations from planned time windows in real time — before they compound into missed deliveries or overtime costs.

ai-operations.title: AI Operations
ai-operations.desc: Anomaly detection, predictive models, and decision automation
ai-operations.problemStatement: Operations generate enough data to act on — but the signal is buried in noise. Anomalies go undetected until they become incidents. Decisions that could be automated still wait for human review, slowing down the operation and exhausting the people running it.
ai-operations.whoThisIsFor: Operations leads and data teams who want to close the loop between sensor data and operational decisions without building and maintaining ML pipelines from scratch.
ai-operations.capability1Body: Flags deviations from expected behavior in real time across any data stream — equipment, vehicle, or process — before they become incidents.
ai-operations.capability2Body: Surfaces early warning signals from equipment data so maintenance can be scheduled proactively rather than reactively after a breakdown.
ai-operations.capability3Body: Defines thresholds and rules that trigger automated responses to known conditions — reducing manual escalation and freeing operators to focus on exceptions.

work.pageSub: One project in production. More on the way.
work.evFleetDesc: End-to-end operations platform for an electric vehicle fleet — real-time tracking, charging management, and dispatch.
work.evFleetExpandedDesc: Connects GPS telemetry from 40+ vehicles with depot charging station APIs to surface real-time state across every operator screen. Built to run without interruption across multiple depots and shift schedules.

about.beliefH1: Operations software that fails in the field is not operations software.
about.beliefSub: We build for operators who can't afford downtime.
about.belief1Title: Built for real machines, not demos
about.belief1Body: We design software knowing it runs on actual hardware — in depots, on roads, in conditions that don't match the ideal. If it doesn't survive contact with the real environment, it doesn't ship.
about.belief2Title: Data is the foundation, not the afterthought
about.belief2Body: Every feature starts with a data model. If we can't measure it, instrument it, and verify it with real data, we don't build it. The dashboard is always the last thing.
about.belief3Title: Systems that scale without a rewrite
about.belief3Body: We make architecture decisions early so pilots don't require a ground-up rebuild to reach production. What works across one depot should work across ten without rearchitecting.
about.currentFocus: We are deep in production on EV fleet operations — real vehicles, real depots, real dispatch. We are growing the platform deliberately, one solved problem at a time. IoT, logistics intelligence, and AI operations are next on the roadmap.

approach.item1Body: We design software knowing it runs on real machines in real conditions — not cloud demos.
approach.item2Body: Every feature starts with a data model. If we can't measure it, we won't build it.
approach.item3Body: Systems go from pilot to production without a rewrite. Architecture decisions are made early.
